title: Focus README on core EVE workflows
summary: The README was rewritten from scratch to cover only installation, repository-local execution, agent and MCP usage, and the runtime architecture.
userVisibleChange: Users now see a short setup guide for installing EVE globally, running it within a repository, connecting agents, and understanding the architecture.

decisions.title: Limit the README to install, local runtime, MCP and agents, and one architecture diagram

validation.command: git diff --check and four-section scope check (passed)
